Name: Kafubu Emerald Lot #001 – 48.4 ct, AAA Grade, Copperbelt Province
Description: Tokenised artisanal emerald production from Kafubu River artisanal mining zone, Copperbelt Province. 48.4 carats total weight, AAA gem-grade (clarity VSI1, colour deep Colombian green). Registered artisanal mining permit: AMP-CBP-2025-0078. Gemstone certificate by Zambia Gemstone Exchange (ZGE): GEM-2025-0312. Chain-of-custody seal ZAGMC-CC-0001.

Name: Lufwanyama Emerald Lot #002 – 32.1 ct, AA Grade, Copperbelt Province
Description: 32.1 carat emerald parcel from Lufwanyama artisanal mining block LMB-045, Copperbelt Province. Colour: medium green, transparency eye-clean. Registered artisanal permit AMP-CBP-2025-0089. ZGE gemstone certificate GEM-2025-0334. MMMD mine production report MPR-2025-0112.

Name: Kafubu Aquamarine Lot #003 – 85.6 ct, AA Grade, Copperbelt Province
Description: 85.6 carats aquamarine crystal (Santa Maria blue colour, eye-clean) mined at Kafubu alluvial workings. AMP-CBP-2025-0095. ZGE certificate GEM-2025-0378. Suitable for cutting and faceting for export jewellery market. Environmental impact monitoring record ZEMA-MIN-2025-0045.

Name: Mwinilunga Amethyst Lot #004 – 420 ct, Grade A, North-Western Province
Description: 420 carats deep purple amethyst parcel from Mwinilunga artisanal mining area, North-Western Province. Colour: deep Siberian purple (AAA). AMP-NWP-2025-0034. ZGE certificate GEM-2025-0401. Suitable for cabochon and faceted cutting for craft export. ZEMA environmental compliance.

Name: Lundazi Tourmaline Lot #005 – 234 ct, Verdelite Green, Eastern Province
Description: 234 carats green tourmaline (verdelite, chromium-bearing, vivid green) from Lundazi artisanal mining block, Eastern Province. AMP-EP-2025-0045. ZGE certificate GEM-2025-0423. High-quality chrome tourmaline in demand for luxury jewellery. ZEMA monitoring report.

Name: Ndola Rural Citrine Lot #006 – 680 ct, Golden Yellow, Copperbelt Province
Description: 680 carats natural citrine (golden-yellow, unheated) from Ndola Rural artisanal workings. AMP-CBP-2025-0102. ZGE certificate GEM-2025-0445. Suitable for large statement pieces; some material meets A+ grade for jewellery-grade faceting. MMMD production report MPR-2025-0167.

Name: Kafubu Emerald Lot #007 – 62.8 ct, AA Grade, Copperbelt Province
Description: 62.8 carats medium-high grade emerald parcel, Kafubu zone, predominantly eye-clean to slightly included. Good medium-deep green colour. AMP-CBP-2025-0118. ZGE certificate GEM-2025-0467. Suitable for cutting and faceting – jewellery export to Dubai and Hong Kong markets.

Name: Mwinilunga Alexandrite Lot #008 – 18.4 ct, Colour-Change, North-Western Province
Description: 18.4 carats rare alexandrite (colour-change chrysoberyl: green in daylight, red/violet under incandescent) from Mwinilunga. AMP-NWP-2025-0056. ZGE certificate GEM-2025-0489. Exceptional colour-change 65% shift confirmed. High-value collector and jewellery-grade gemstones.

Name: Kasama Topaz Lot #009 – 1,240 ct, Blue, Northern Province
Description: 1,240 carats natural blue topaz crystals from Kasama Northern Province artisanal workings. AMP-NP-2025-0034. ZGE certificate GEM-2025-0501. London Blue colour variety. Suitable for faceted cutting for fashion jewellery export. MMMD production report attached.

Name: Lundazi Red Garnet Lot #010 – 380 ct, Pyrope-Almandite, Eastern Province
Description: 380 carats red garnet (pyrope-almandite mix, deep red) from Lundazi Eastern Province artisanal block. AMP-EP-2025-0061. ZGE certificate GEM-2025-0523. Suitable for mass-market jewellery and industrial abrasive uses. Environmental monitoring ZEMA-MIN-2025-0089.

Name: ASM Registered Mining Claim – Kafubu Zone Block KFB-012 – Emerald Mining Area
Description: Registered artisanal and small-scale mining (ASM) claim block KFB-012, Kafubu River area, Copperbelt Province. Area: 1.2 hectares. Mineral licensed: emerald and semi-precious stones. Licence: MMMD-ASM-2025-0078. Environmental clearance: ZEMA-ECL-2025-0045. Water use permit: WARMA-WU-2025-0067.

Name: ASM Registered Mining Claim – Lufwanyama Block LMB-045 – Emerald & Aquamarine
Description: ASM claim block LMB-045, Lufwanyama District, Copperbelt Province. 0.8 hectares. Minerals licensed: emerald, aquamarine, beryl. MMMD-ASM-2025-0089. Annual renewal fee ZMW 45,000 paid. Environmental plan approved by ZEMA-ECL-2025-0056. Community benefit sharing agreement with Chief Mushili's area.

Name: ASM Registered Mining Claim – Mwinilunga Block MWB-023 – Amethyst & Alexandrite
Description: ASM claim block MWB-023, Mwinilunga District, North-Western Province. 1.5 hectares. Minerals: amethyst, alexandrite, tourmaline. MMMD-ASM-2025-0102. Community consultation with Chief Sailung completed. ZEMA-ECL-2025-0067. WARMA seasonal water use permit.

Name: ASM Registered Mining Claim – Lundazi Block LDB-018 – Tourmaline & Garnet
Description: ASM claim block LDB-018, Lundazi District, Eastern Province. 1.1 hectares. Minerals: verdelite tourmaline, garnet, spessartite. MMMD-ASM-2025-0118. Community benefit agreement with Chief Mwase. ZEMA-ECL-2025-0078. ZRA royalty agreement RA-2025-0034.

Name: ASM Registered Mining Claim – Kasama Block KSB-007 – Topaz & Quartz
Description: ASM claim block KSB-007, Kasama District, Northern Province. 0.9 hectares. Minerals: blue topaz, rose quartz, smoky quartz. MMMD-ASM-2025-0134. ZEMA-ECL-2025-0089. ZRA royalty agreement RA-2025-0045. Annual claim fee ZMW 40,500 paid.

Name: ASM Registered Mining Claim – Ndola Rural Block NRB-031 – Citrine & Smoky Quartz
Description: ASM claim block NRB-031, Ndola Rural, Copperbelt Province. 1.0 hectares. Minerals: citrine, smoky quartz, mica. MMMD-ASM-2025-0145. ZEMA-ECL-2025-0095. ZRA royalty agreement RA-2025-0056. Rehabilitation fund contribution ZMW 12,000/year.

Name: ASM Registered Mining Claim – Kafue Block KFE-009 – Alluvial Semi-Precious Stones
Description: ASM alluvial claim KFE-009 along Kafue River, Kafue District, Lusaka Province. 0.5 hectares. Minerals: alluvial citrine, amethyst, jasper. MMMD-ASM-2025-0156. WARMA riverbed licence WR-2025-0034. ZEMA-ECL-2025-0102. Seasonal panning permit valid June–October.

Name: ASM Registered Mining Claim – Ikelenge Block IKB-004 – Ruby & Sapphire
Description: ASM claim block IKB-004, Ikelenge District, North-Western Province. 0.7 hectares. Minerals: ruby, sapphire, spinel. MMMD-ASM-2025-0167. ZEMA-ECL-2025-0112. Potential for high-value corundum. Community consultation completed with Chief Ikelenge. ZRA royalty agreement RA-2025-0067.

Name: ASM Copper Production – Chifubu Peri-Urban Area, Ndola – 1,840 kg Blister Copper
Description: 1,840 kg blister copper (85–90% Cu purity) smelted by artisanal smelters at Chifubu, Ndola. Ore sourced from licensed shallow pit, mined with MMMD artisanal mining permit AMP-CBP-2025-0178. ZCCM-IH off-take agreement OTA-2025-0034. MMMD production report MPR-2025-0189.

Name: ASM Copper Production – Kitwe Peri-Urban Mines – 2,120 kg Blister Copper
Description: 2,120 kg blister copper from Kitwe peri-urban artisanal mining area. MMMD licensed shallow pit AMP-CBP-2025-0189. ZCCM-IH metal bulletin price peg. ZEMA environmental monitoring EMR-2025-0045. ZRA royalty receipt ROY-2025-0078. Destination: Chambishi Metals smelter for refining.

Name: ASM Copper Production – Luanshya Tailings Recovery – 960 kg Copper Cement
Description: 960 kg copper cement (60–65% Cu) from licensed artisanal tailings recovery operation at Luanshya old dump. Environmental protection licence EPL-2025-0045. MMMD artisanal tailings permit AMP-CBP-2025-0201. ZCCM-IH off-take OTA-2025-0045. ZEMA compliance monitoring report.

Name: ASM Copper Production – Solwezi Small-Scale Open Pit – 3,200 kg Copper Oxide Ore
Description: 3,200 kg copper oxide ore (10–18% Cu, acid-leachable grade) from Solwezi small-scale open-pit licence holder. MMMD licence SMML-NWP-2025-0034. Ore sold to First Quantum Minerals SXEW plant under tolling agreement TA-2025-0089. ZEMA monitoring report EMR-2025-0067.

Name: Mineral Royalty Token – ZRA Gemstones Q1 2025 – ZMW 48,000
Description: Mineral royalty token representing Q1 2025 gemstone royalty payment by Zambia Artisanal Gemstone Miners Cooperative to Zambia Revenue Authority. Royalty rate: 6% of gross sales value (Mines and Minerals Development Act). ZRA receipt MR-GEM-2025-Q1-0034. Amount: ZMW 48,000.

Name: Mineral Royalty Token – ZRA Copper Q2 2025 – ZMW 54,720
Description: Mineral royalty token representing Q2 2025 artisanal copper royalty payment to ZRA. Royalty rate: 4% of gross sales (Mines and Minerals Development Act s.87). ZRA receipt MR-COP-2025-Q2-0067. Covers Chifubu, Kitwe, Luanshya and Solwezi ASM copper production. Amount: ZMW 54,720.

Name: Mineral Royalty Token – ZRA Gemstones Q3 2025 – ZMW 62,400
Description: Mineral royalty token for Q3 2025 gemstone sales royalty. Covers Kafubu emeralds, Mwinilunga amethyst/alexandrite, Lundazi tourmaline, and Kasama topaz. 6% royalty rate. ZRA receipt MR-GEM-2025-Q3-0089. MMMD production returns MPR-Q3-2025-0112 attached. Amount: ZMW 62,400.
